commodities.heroSubtitle: A structured view of the commodity landscape — gold, copper, and the macro forces driving the next decade of returns.
commodities.upgradeBody: Go deeper with live price data, historical context, and complete investment theses for gold, copper, and the broader real assets universe.
commodities.subscribeSubtitle: Stay ahead of macro shifts with our weekly commodity brief.

sovereign.heroSubtitle: The macro undercurrents shaping commodity demand for the next decade — central banks, monetary systems, and fiscal reality.
sovereign.frameworkDesc: Every commodity thesis at Ezponda Capital is anchored in a sovereign macro view. These are the structural forces we track.
sovereign.theme0Desc: Sovereign wealth funds and central banks are quietly accumulating gold and real assets at record pace, diversifying away from dollar-denominated instruments.
sovereign.theme1Desc: Bilateral trade settlements in local currencies, BRICS expansion, and the weaponization of the dollar are accelerating a structural monetary shift.
sovereign.theme2Desc: Government debt levels globally have reached a point where central banks cannot raise rates without causing fiscal crises — a structural tailwind for hard assets.
sovereign.theme3Desc: The era of deeply negative real yields supercharged gold. As real rates normalize, the commodity thesis evolves — but does not disappear.
sovereign.upgradeBody: Access deep-dive sovereign macro reports, updated monthly — covering central bank flows, reserve composition shifts, and real yield dynamics.

methodology.title: Investment Methodology
methodology.step0Desc: We start with top-down macro analysis: monetary cycles, real yields, dollar dynamics, and structural demand shifts.
methodology.step1Desc: Only asymmetric opportunities make the cut. High potential return relative to clearly defined risk.
methodology.step2Desc: Research is framed for serious investors — not financial media. No noise, no narratives. Just structured conviction.
